summary: First-run E2E testing of Stok-Takip (Turkish stock app). Created /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py with 38 pytest cases covering auth, products, customers, productions, sales, stock adjust/movements, dashboard, reports, users + role-based access. All 38 tests pass (100%). Frontend smoke-tested: login flow works with admin@stoktakip.com/Admin123!, JWT stored in localStorage + cookies set; sidebar navigation renders; dashboard summary, products, customers, sales, stock, reports pages all load and call backend successfully (all 200s); GBP currency rendered correctly (£); DD.MM.YYYY date format; recent productions and sales from test data visible on dashboard.
action_items: Frontend routing: direct URLs /productions and /users redirect to / (root). Verify actual route paths in App.js (likely /production or admin users hidden under /settings). Not blocking but a deep-link inconsistency.

Pydantic EmailStr rejects .test/.local TLDs. Tests now use @example.com. If real users try internal-only emails (e.g. user@company.local), registration will 422. Consider relaxing validator or documenting allowed domains.

DELETE /api/customers does soft-delete (sets active=false) but GET /api/customers does not filter active by default — soft-deleted customers still appear. Add active_only support like products endpoint.
critical_code_review_comments: JWT_SECRET present in /app/backend/.env — good. Cookies set with secure=False (acceptable for preview/proxy http) and samesite=lax.

Stock movements correctly created on product create (baslangic), update (manuel), production (uretim), sale (satis), adjust (manuel/fire/iade), sale/production deletion (iade). Insufficient-stock guard works (400).
Soft delete works for products (admin only). Customers soft-delete sets active=false but list endpoint doesn't filter — minor inconsistency.
server.py is 870 lines — monolithic. For future maintainability consider splitting into routers/services modules (auth, products, sales, etc.).
Admin password is re-seeded/refreshed on startup if it doesn't match env (good idempotent seed).
test_credentials: admin@stoktakip.com / Admin123! (seeded admin). Test users created/deleted within pytest.
seed_data_creation: Pytest creates and cleans up a test product, customer, production, sale, and personel/rapor users each run. Some data remains active during test if cleanup is interrupted (uses TEST_ / random uuid suffixes).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py uses requests against REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL/api. Admin login is seeded automatically by backend startup. Email validator (pydantic) rejects reserved TLDs like .test — use @example.com. Frontend uses Bearer-token-from-localStorage + cookies; login sets data-testid login-email-input / login-password-input / login-submit-button. Sidebar nav labels in Turkish.
